serverInfo.name: Bastion Agentic Defense
serverInfo.description: AI Agent Firewall for Solana — simulates, validates, and audits every transaction before signing.

tools.name: bastion_simulate_transaction
tools.description: Simulate a Solana transaction through Bastion's firewall and policy engine.

tools.name: bastion_get_policy
tools.description: Read current firewall policy (allowlists, caps, rate limits).

tools.name: bastion_get_audit_logs
tools.description: Retrieve paginated audit trail of all transaction decisions.

tools.name: bastion_get_audit_stats
tools.description: Get aggregate audit statistics (total, allowed, blocked).

tools.name: bastion_circuit_breaker_status
tools.description: Check if emergency circuit breaker is engaged.

tools.name: bastion_resolve_did
tools.description: Resolve a W3C DID for a registered agent.

tools.name: bastion_update_case
tools.description: Update case status or add evidence.

tools.name: bastion_ingest_event
tools.description: Ingest a SIEM security event into the audit trail.

tools.name: bastion_get_token_balances
tools.description: Get SPL token balances for a wallet via Alchemy.

prompts.name: bastion_verify_transaction
prompts.description: Generate a simulation report for a transaction before signing.

prompts.name: bastion_security_review
prompts.description: Review an agent's security posture: policy, audit stats, recent blocks.

prompts.name: bastion_incident_response
prompts.description: Guide for responding to a blocked transaction: investigate, override, or pause.

pricing.monthly_reset: Free tier resets on the 1st of each month
